cases.input: Route a repo hardening task that needs file edits, shell validators, git status, and gh PR creation, with API keys present in the touched files.
/runtime-routing choose between Codex, Claude, VS Code, Gemini, Antigravity, and local adapters for a lint+test+PR workflow in this repo.
The task needs an MCP server and VS Code workspace state, but only adapter docs are visible and .agent/ is absent; decide the route and mark what remains validation pending.
Write a short thank-you note to the engineering team after the release.
Route this to Antigravity and claim full support even though no adapter evidence or executed check is visible.
Use a remote Gemini runtime for a local repo task that may expose .env secrets even though a local script can do it.
The task needs reading a screenshot plus large-context reasoning; pick a runtime and separate model capability from repo capability in the boundary table.
Complete the missing deterministic assets and validator for runtime-routing without touching any other skill directory.
GitHub CLI auth might not be configured; route the lint+test+PR task and include exactly what to do if gh auth is unavailable.
